candidate_definitions.text: Chinese text normalization for speech processing

Search for "Text Normalization"(TN) on Google and Github, you can hardly find open-source projects that are "read-to-use" for text normalization tasks. Instead, you find a bunch of NLP toolkits or frameworks that *supports* TN functionality. There is quite some work between "sup…
NeMo text processing for ASR and TTS
Convert English text from written expressions into spoken forms

This repository houses my solution to Google's [Text Normalization Challenge - English Language](https://www.kaggle.com/c/text-normalization-challenge-english-language). Most of the magic happens within the converter directory, which is responsible for the actual conversions fro…
